name: ableton-control
description: Ableton Setlist Controller is a project to manage live setlists in Arrangement View in Ableton Live focused on live performances. It is designed as a local web application to be used on devices connected to the same router.

scripts.build:partial: npm run build:ui && npm run build:folder && npm run build:server && npm run build:worker
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:folder && npm run build:server && npm run build:worker && npm run build:sea

author: Rafael Salcedo
